Medical Devices Case

Medical Device R&D Prototype and Positioning Fixture

R&D prototype / positioning fixture / low-volume verification

IndustriesMedical Devices
Part FunctionR&D prototype / positioning fixture / low-volume verification
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC machining, stainless steel and engineering plastic parts, drawing review and inspection data

Project Scenario

The project combined prototype parts and positioning fixtures for a medical device R&D team before a larger verification run.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivered samples and fixture references provided dimensional feedback for the next design iteration.
